summary: NVDA next earnings: Q1 FY2027 results expected May 20, 2026 (some sources say May 27). Analyst estimates: EPS $1.75, revenue $78.78B. Most recent quarter (Q4 FY2026, reported Feb 25, 2026): EPS $1.62, beat estimate of $1.50 by 8%.
